statement: Before acting on knowledge that may be outdated (API signatures, framework versions, library behavior, CLI flags), use web/fetch or search_web to verify against current documentation. Training data has a cutoff — volatile details change faster than model training cycles.
publicSummary: Verify volatile knowledge (API versions, flags, defaults) against live docs before acting on it.
cautionNotes: Not needed for stable concepts (algorithms, language syntax). Focus on recently-changed or version-dependent details.
